name: Daily Warmup — 20 min
description: A gentle daily warmup that touches metronome time, technique drilling, and a cool-down. Good default first routine for anyone new to the app.

items.label: Metronome + long tones (3 min)
items.instruction: Open the Metronome module (or hum along in your head). 60 BPM in 4/4. Play long, relaxed tones — one note per beat, or one note per measure. Focus on tone quality and physical looseness.

items.label: Technique drill of your choice (12 min)
items.instruction: Pick any drill from your Arpeggios, Key Sequencer, or Scale Driller library. Play at a comfortable tempo. This is a warmup, not a stretch session — cleanliness over speed.

items.label: Metronome up to 100 BPM (3 min)
items.instruction: Same warm scale or pattern, now at 100 BPM. Just to wake up the fast side of your hands.

items.label: Cool-down (2 min)
items.instruction: Slow down. Play something you love — anything. Let the practice session end on a musical note, not a technical one.
